name: Synthesis Overreach review for Ssr Sparse Data Supplementation bundle
summary: Synthesis-overreach review found the baseline claim appropriately scoped as a targeted literature pass with moderate confidence. The claim separates essay scoring, constructed-response, science-response, chemistry-reasoning, and small text-classification examples; it states that roles vary across training augmentation, class balancing, benchmarking, fairness analysis, and generation-quality validation. Limitations cover targeted search scope, heterogeneous tasks, and label-source caveats.
